Sign in

INDEXTECH Enterprise Suite — CRM, finance, HR, projects, procurement, and operations. Works in the browser on any device once this app is hosted on your company website or intranet.

Central database: With the Node server running, CRM, inventory, documents, and settings are stored in one shared SQLite database on the server (data/suite.db). All signed-in employees see the same data. Back up that file or use Reports → Export full backup.

First-time setup: default account is admin / admin123. Add more users under Settings → Users & roles, then change the administrator password.
